About.title: EXPERIENCE
About.role: ROLE: Fullstack Developer. Stack: React / Next.js / TypeScript / Node.js.
About.e2e: END-TO-END: High-performance SaaS, MVP, and business logic development. Integrations: AmoCRM, YooKassa, Robokassa.
About.frontend: FRONTEND: SPA/SSR architecture. Advanced UI/UX systems, custom animations, and WebGL/3D (React Three Fiber).
About.backend: BACKEND: Relational & NoSQL database schema design. Async process optimization (workers, webhooks, data parsing).
About.devops: INFRASTRUCTURE: Containerization (Docker), web servers (Nginx), process management (PM2), and SSL certification.

About-tab.title: CAT SYSTEM_CORE_PROFILE.MD --VERBOSE
About-tab.overview_text: 3.5 years of commercial Fullstack experience. Specializing in e2e-delivery of complex product features, high-performance SaaS scaling, e-commerce platforms, and deep Telegram ecosystem integration (Mini Apps / Bots). Focused on building resilient backend cores and securing web infrastructure.
About-tab.workflow_text_1: ► System Design: Prioritize transactional safety at the database level (PostgreSQL/RPC), strict resource control (RLS/ACL policies), and building custom messaging engines to route traffic across concurrent microservices.
About-tab.workflow_text_2: ► Deployment & Infrastructure: Experienced in deploying automation via self-hosted configurations (Docker, Coolify) and isolating bare-metal production environments via SSH. Ensure system fault tolerance using PM2 process persistence.
About-tab.ai_text_1: ► Development Co-processor: Leverage advanced LLMs to bootstrap boilerplate code, generate configuration assets, and significantly speed up initial prototyping during setup routines.
About-tab.ai_text_2: ► Telemetry Parsing: Utilize AI as a utility tool for auditing heavy log outputs and tracking runtime anomalies. Core architecture design, security audits, and complex SQL query optimization remain strictly manual tasks.
About-tab.hobby_text_1: ► Secure Routing: Manage a home network stack utilizing custom-configured VPN tunnels and routing gateways to eliminate environment network overlap and ensure stable access.
About-tab.hobby_text_2: ► Self-Hosted Ecosystems: Maintain dedicated local media repositories (Jellyfin) and microservices in isolated Docker containers with automated backup and storage optimization.
About-tab.edu_text: ► VSUET - Information Systems and Programming (Vocational Degree). Foundational knowledge in computer science, software engineering core standards, and algorithmic layout (Graduated 2023).
